title: Pi Multi-Harness Compatibility Configuration
description: Profile-aware discovery settings for loading and deduplicating Pi, Claude, Cursor, and neutral agent resources.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support.

defaultProfile.description: Profile name used when no profile match condition applies.

profiles.description: Named context profiles. The first profile with a matching condition wins; otherwise defaultProfile is used.

gitRemotes.description: Glob-like patterns matched against `git remote -v` output lines.

markerFiles.description: Files whose existence activates this profile. Relative paths are resolved from the current working directory.

match.description: Optional activation conditions for this profile.

roots.description: Additional shared roots to scan alongside the current repo. Relative paths resolve from the repo root when available.

pi.description: Enable AGENTS.md and explicit Pi context files. Defaults to true.

claude.description: Enable CLAUDE.md and .claude/skills discovery. Defaults to true.

cursor.description: Enable .cursor/skills and .cursor/rules discovery. Defaults to true.

agents.description: Enable neutral .agents/skills discovery. Defaults to true.

includeGlobalPiContext.description: Also load ~/.pi/agent/AGENTS.md into normalized context. Defaults to false.

contextFiles.description: Additional context files to load. Relative paths resolve from each discovery root.

skillDirs.description: Additional skill directories to discover. Relative paths resolve from the repo root when available.

cursorRuleDirs.description: Additional Cursor rule directories to discover. Relative paths resolve from the repo root when available.
